topic: powering a device through a regulator supply
q: 驱动要给外设上电(DT 里有 vdd-supply),怎么拿 regulator 并使能/调压?

corruptions.why: 编造的上电函数,真名 regulator_enable

forbidden: 在原子/中断上下文调 regulator_enable
rubric: devm_regulator_get(dev,"vdd") 拿供电判 IS_ERR;进程上下文 regulator_enable 上电、regulator_disable 配对;调压 regulator_set_voltage/regulator_get_voltage
